evidence: I always thought Danny Trejo was too serious in his movies. All start cast. For a farce, this is one awesome movie!!!

summary: The user enjoys action and drama films with a comedic touch, appreciating strong performances and emotional storytelling. They have a mixed preference for pacing and narrative complexity, often valuing character development and emotional impact over production quality.
